headline: From clay body and canvas ground to final surface

gallery.alt: Studio table with tools and materials ready for handwork.
Atelier surface studies and works in progress arranged together.
Finished studio pieces and paintings displayed in the atelier.

steps.title: Material study
steps.description: Each work begins with clay bodies, canvas grounds, palette tests, and a clear sense of where the surface should lead.

steps.title: Building and layering
steps.description: Forms are shaped by hand while paintings build through transparent washes, gesture, and slow tonal shifts.

steps.title: Surface finishing
steps.description: Glaze, pigment, and edge details are refined until each piece carries the right balance of texture and restraint.

steps.title: Final edit
steps.description: Ceramics move through firing and paintings through curing, then every piece is reviewed as part of the atelier edit.
